structured_content.text: 💄Revlon: Lipstick on a Pig? Part I.💄 - PETITION

New York-based Revlon Inc. ($REV) is a 90-year old household name with a strong brand powered by influencers like Olivia Wilde, Emma Stone, Halle Barry, and Wonderwoman. It prints over $2b in annual revenue and, yet, despite the glamor of Hollywood, is collapsing under the weight of (a) increased competition from upstart direct-to-consumer digitally nat…
